supersedes: verified_arithmetic.json for line-item totals; original ratio logic still valid
purpose: Recompute the ₹263/day Indian alternative stack item-by-item against verified_prices_v2.json. Apply Devil's Advocate guidance (MRP anchor not promo floor, range midpoints, dose-adjusted where v1 under-specced).
anchoring_rule: Where a range exists, use the median of MRP-anchored prices, not the promo floor. Where the dossier under-spec'd a dose, raise the price to the evidence-based dose.

alt_daily_stack_round3.rationale: Tetley 25-bag ₹144.5 → ₹5.78/bag; Lipton ₹6.84/bag; organic variants ₹8-10. Midpoint of mass/organic anchor.
Kitchen-staple scale; defensible on first principles (₹250/kg turmeric → <₹0.5/g; pepper ₹800-1,200/kg). HOLD pending round-3 fetch.
Rasayanam KSM-66 500mg 60 caps: Blinkit ₹679 (promo) to Apollo ₹999 (MRP). At 1 cap/day: range ₹11.3-16.7. Median ₹14 anchored to MRP per DA promo-pricing guidance.
BB Super Saver ₹87/kg → ₹4.35/50g; BB Royal ₹107/kg → ₹5.35/50g; Red Masoor Whole ₹129/kg → ₹6.45/50g. Median ₹5-6. Round to ₹6.
Broccoli+cauliflower 250g combined. HOLD. Approx check: broccoli ₹60-100/250g, cauliflower ₹20-35/250g. Combined half-portion of each ≈ ₹20-30. Dossier ₹25 passes sanity test.
BB Royal Organic Moringa Powder 100g ₹60 → ₹6 per 100g. Methi fresh ₹20-40/250g. Fresh leaves home-grown often free. Median anchor ₹13 assumes powder blend + fresh methi.

Fresho Button 200g ₹56.5 → ₹14/50g; Oyster ₹85/200g → ₹21/50g. Midpoint ₹17-18. CAVEAT: 50g fresh ≈ subtherapeutic for ergothioneine target (~100g oyster or shiitake needed). Price correct; biology claim needs separate fix per review_devil.

Fortune Kachi Ghani ₹141/L → ₹2.12/tbsp; Patanjali ₹200/L → ₹3/tbsp. Cold-press premium ₹4/tbsp. Median ₹3 for mass brand. CRITICAL CAVEAT: erucic-acid warning required (see safety_layer.json); price unchanged but section S9 contraindication MUST ship.
BB Popular California ₹449/500g → ₹22.45/25g; Vedaka ₹245/250g → ₹24.5/25g. Mandi wholesale ₹980/kg → ₹24.5/25g. Dossier understated by ~25%. Use ₹23.
BB Royal Kashmiri 500g ₹868 → ₹26/15g; 100g pack ₹149 → ₹22.35/15g. Median ₹24. BIOLOGY CAVEAT: walnut ALA ≠ marine EPA/DHA (review_devil HIGH); retain algal oil line item separately.
Mass-brand chia ₹3-4/tbsp; flax powder ₹1/tbsp; sesame ₹1-2/tbsp. Blended ₹5-7. Use ₹6.
Akshayakalpa A2 Farm Fresh 500ml ₹53 → ₹10.6/100ml. A2 Pasteurised ₹45 → ₹9/100ml. Regular cow milk ₹6/100ml. Dossier ₹18 is 70% overstated. Use ₹11 for A2 anchor.

Mason & Co 300g estimated ₹1,100-1,200 → ₹9.4-11.25/tsp. Dossier ₹6 is 40% understated. Use ₹10. BIOLOGY BLOCKER: flavanol content UNVERIFIED for Mason & Co, Ariba, Wakao per review_devil CRITICAL. Price correct; 'matches Blueprint' claim cannot ship without independent HPLC assay.
Peak season (amla Oct-Mar, pom Sep-Feb): ₹15-17. Off-season ≈2× blended ≈ ₹20-25. Year-round average ₹20. Note: seasonal calendar (S7) must ship to explain variance.

A2 Kapiva ₹1099/500ml → ₹11/tsp. Regular Amul ₹306/500ml → ₹3.06/tsp. Dossier ₹6 conflates regular and A2. Since dossier copy says 'A2 ghee' (D4), the honest anchor is ₹11. CAVEAT: A2 saturated fat = 62%; Indian baseline ApoB/LDL elevated; contraindication gating required per review_devil HIGH and safety_layer.
Amul dahi ₹60/400g → ₹15/100g. Mother Dairy ~₹50/400g. Homemade cheaper. Range ₹8-15 per serving. Dossier ₹10 sits in range. HOLD at ₹10.

Jamun (May-Jul) ₹120-200/500g → ₹6-10/serving peak, scarce off-season. Guava year-round ₹40-80/500g → ₹4-8/serving. Papaya ₹30-60/500g. Year-round blended average ~₹12-18 per 100g serving. Dossier ₹15 in range. HOLD at ₹15. Seasonal calendar S7 must show which fruit applies when.
INLIFE Vegetarian DHA 60 caps ₹999 → ₹16.65/cap (1000mg algal, 400mg DHA). Defensible at ₹17.

HK Vitals D3+K2 ₹4.41/tab but only 600 IU. Dossier claims 2000 IU target → 3-4× dose OR premium high-strength at ~₹8-10/day. Correcting to ₹9 to honour the 2000 IU claim. Alternative: change dose claim to 600 IU and keep ₹4.
MuscleBlaze 250g ₹549-899 → ₹10.98-17.98 per 5g serving. CreaPRO Creapure ₹549/250g → ₹10.98. Dossier ₹6 is 45-60% understated. 500g+ pack drops to ₹7-8. Median ₹11 for common single-tub purchase.
MuscleBlaze Mag Glycinate 2000mg 60 tabs ₹599 → ₹9.98/tab (Flipkart); HK variant ₹719 → ₹11.98. Median ₹11.

round3_alt_daily_total.conclusion: After 21-item recomputation the corrected alt daily total lands in ₹259–₹267 depending on A2-ghee assumption and D3K2 dose. Dossier's ₹263 was arithmetically reachable through offsetting over/understatements. The headline daily figure is essentially unchanged (±2%).
round3_alt_daily_total.net_error_character: Offsetting: ~₹40 overstatement on a2_milk/mushroom/moringa/amla_pom/mustard_oil/seed_mix/green_tea was cancelled by ~₹40 understatement on almond/walnut/cacao/creatine/mag_gly/ghee/d3k2. Dossier was directionally lucky, not right.

hero_ratio_round3.conclusion: Option C daily-cost hero holds. '~12× cheaper per day for the plate, not the protocol' is defensible across the ghee/dose assumption range.
hero_ratio_round3.recommended_headline_number: ₹264 (mid, A2-ghee assumption — matches dossier copy direction) or ₹259 (if page pivots to regular ghee with LDL caveat)

verified_corrections_from_v2.rationale: 250g packs ₹780-1,500 → 30g portion ₹94-180, median ₹140. Dossier ₹240 used premium boutique anchor.
Half-cup mixed berries+cherries live Apr 2026 ₹120-200. Median ₹160.
Fresh shiitake at Indian specialty retail ₹600-1,000/100g → ₹300-500/50g. Dossier understated.
Landed India estimate ₹156-400/serving. Dossier ₹387 at upper end but plausible. HOLD pending cart-screenshot fetch.

bj_replica_round3_status.observation: By coincidence, macadamia+berries overstatements (-220) are exactly offset by shiitake understatement (+220). ₹3,062 total holds after 4 of 18 corrections.

devils_advocate_inoculation_applied.price_volatility: Every corrected_inr is MRP-anchored or median-of-MRP, not promo floor. Per DA HIGH on price_macadamia_250g.
devils_advocate_inoculation_applied.link_rot: All source URLs recorded in verified_prices_v2.json with vendor names; Wayback capture job still required before launch (DA HIGH on price_imported_blueberry).
devils_advocate_inoculation_applied.dose_misrepresentation: KSM-66 at ₹14 (not ₹12) reflects branded Rasayanam 500mg at 1 cap/day (DA HIGH on price_ksm66_ashwagandha).
devils_advocate_inoculation_applied.biology_caveats_preserved: Cacao flavanol UNVERIFIED blocker, walnut ALA≠EPA/DHA, mustard oil erucic-acid, A2 ghee saturated fat, moringa heavy metals, pomegranate urolithin non-producers — all flagged in rationale fields and deferred to S8/S9 panels in v2 design brief.

open_items_for_round4: Verify 14 remaining BJ replica line items (see bj_replica_round3_status.still_pending_verification)
